person_name: Fredegund, Queen of Neustria (wife of Chilperic I, d. 597)
person_name_full: Fredegund, Queen of Neustria (wife of Chilperic I, d. 597)
notes: Queen of Neustria, wife of Chilperic I, known as a formidable and ruthless figure in Frankish history.

docs.title: Letter 9002
docs.author: Venantius Fortunatus
docs.excerpt: … one of the most formidable and ruthless figures in the history of the Frankish kingdom]. The one you mourn is not lost — he is only ahead of you. You sent him into this world; God has called him out of it into a better one. What you held briefly, eternity holds permanently.
